subject: [PATCH nfs-utils 13/17] exportd/mountd: use cache type from notifications to target scanning

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch's handling of cache notifications. Suggested adding a check to ensure that the notification is not empty before parsing its attributes.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch modifies the exportd/mountd components of the nfs-utils package to use cache type information from netlink multicast notifications to target scanning. It parses NFSD_A_CACHE_NOTIFY_CACHE_TYPE and SUNRPC_A_CACHE_NOTIFY_CACHE_TYPE attributes, determines which caches have pending requests, and only issues GET_REQS for those caches, reducing unnecessary netlink round-trips.
